headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy Rating on Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO)
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the 10 Best Quality Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 4, 2026, Jefferies analyst Surinder Thind lowered the firm’s price target on Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) to $1,700 from $1,800 while maintaining a Buy rating. The firm said FICO’s fiscal Q2 results […]
